summary: Wireshark for AI Agents: passive eBPF observability Discussion | Link
content: Heron is a passive network analyzer that reconstructs what your AI agents are actually doing. Zero SDKs. Zero proxy. Hook eBPF to see TLS-encrypted LLM calls and identify which agent process made them.
chineseSummary: 用于 AI 代理的 Wireshark：被动 eBPF 可观测性讨论 |关联
chineseContent: Heron 是一款被动网络分析器，可以重建人工智能代理实际正在执行的操作。零 SDK。零代理。挂钩 eBPF 以查看 TLS 加密的 LLM 调用并识别哪个代理进程发出了这些调用。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
